zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjory or Mariota Menzies於1437年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾維姆時，她的父親Sir John Menzies28歲，母親Lady Janet Carruthers27歲。她於1457年與Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool在蘇格蘭度福利爾考普爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1481年在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾盧維爾享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marjory or Mariota Menzies于1437年出生在英国苏格兰培爾維姆时，她的父亲Sir John Menzies28岁，母亲Lady Janet Carruthers27岁。她于1457年与Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool在苏格兰度福利爾考普爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1481年在英国苏格兰度福利爾盧維爾享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Menzies
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: variant of Manners , in which the z was originally the Middle English letter ʒ (yogh), representing a sound similar to modern English y. The surname is pronounced Meenyus or Minyas in Scotland. The name was brought to Scotland in the 12th or 13th century by a family of Norman knights. It appears that the name was re-interpreted in Gaelic as containing a personal name, and for variants ending -s there is a possibility of confusion with McManus . See also McMinn .

variants.name: Minges
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gunter, Kurt.
Altered form of Scottish   Menzies  , reflecting the traditional Scottish pronunciation of that name.

variants.name: Mingus
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Menzies  , which is traditionallypronounced ‘mingiz’.

variants.name: Manners
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnières-en-Bray in Seine-Maritime, recorded in the 13th century as Maneria, a derivative of Latin manere ‘to remain, abide, reside’. See also Menzies .

variants.name: McMinn
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Méinn ‘son of Méinn’, a Gaelic interpretation of Menzies as a relationship surname.

nameMeanings.name: Marjory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Mariota
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjory or Mariota Menzies was born in 1437, in Weem, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Menzies, was 28 and her mother, Lady Janet Carruthers, was 27. She married Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool in 1457, in Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1481, in Ruthwell, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjory or Mariota Menzies est née en 1437, à Weem, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Menzies, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Janet Carruthers, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool en 1457, à Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1481, à Ruthwell, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marjory or Mariota Menzies 1437 in Weem, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Menzies 28 und ihre Mutter Lady Janet Carruthers 27. Sie hat 1457 in Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1481 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Ruthwell, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marjory or Mariota Menzies è nata il nel 1437 nel Weem, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Menzies, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Lady Janet Carruthers, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool nel 1457, nel Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1481, nel Ruthwell, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marjory or Mariota Menziesが1437年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアウィームで生まれた時，父Sir John Menziesは28歳，母Lady Janet Carruthersは27歳であった。1457年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアコクプオオルでSir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpoolと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1481年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアルスウエルで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marjory or Mariota Menzies(이)가 1437년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 위에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Menzies(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Janet Carruthers(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1457년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 콕포에서 Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1481년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 루스웰에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marjory or Mariota Menzies nasceu em 1437, em Weem, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Menzies, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Janet Carruthers, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool em 1457, em Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1481, em Ruthwell, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjory or Mariota Menzies родилась в 1437 г. в местности вим, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Menzies было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Janet Carruthers, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool в 1457 г. в местности коккпул, думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1481 г. в местности рутвелл, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marjory or Mariota Menzies nació en 1437, en Weem, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Menzies, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Janet Carruthers, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir Cuthbert Murray of Cockpool en 1457, en Cockpool, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1481, en Ruthwell, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años.
